description:

- Subject: Review Response Package for Completeness
- Priority: High
- Start Date: 06/15/2025
- Due Date: 08/01/2025
- Percent Complete: 0
- Details: Review all documents in the FOIA response package to ensure completeness and compliance with agency disclosure guidelines before final release to the requester. Flag any Exemption 5 deliberative process claims for attorney review.
